problem.summary: Copy a row-major matrix from input to output while preserving values. The baseline maps adjacent lanes across rows, causing strided row-major access. The optimized version maps adjacent lanes across columns.
outputs: output contains input[row * cols + col] for every valid element
constraints: rows and cols may not be multiples of the block dimensions
input and output do not alias

verification.method: Compare output against host or device reference copy for multiple matrix shapes. The 4096x4096 and 8192x1024 gfx1201 runs passed with max_abs_error=0 and bad_count=0.

curation.notes: Ported from the CUDA corpus on 2026-05-20. On 2026-05-28, AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201 HIP-event timing measured 3.28205 ms baseline versus 0.23530 ms optimized for 4096x4096 fp32 copy, speedup 13.948364x; and 0.45355 ms baseline versus 0.06205 ms optimized for 8192x1024 fp32 copy, speedup 7.309428x. No rocprofiler/rocprof counters were collected.
